name: Delicious Potato Doughnuts
recipeIngredient: 2 cups hot mashed potatoes (mashed with milk and butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, sugar, buttermilk, and eggs. Stir in the melted butter, baking soda, baking powder, nutmeg, salt, and enough of the flour to form a soft dough.
2. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface; pat it out to 3/4-inch thickness.
3. Cut the dough into rounds using a 2-1/2-inch floured doughnut cutter.
4. Heat 1 inch of oil in an electric skillet to 350°F (175°C).
5. Fry the doughnuts for 2 minutes per side or until browned. Remove with paper towels.
6. For frosting, sift together sugar, cocoa, and salt into a large bowl.
7. Stir in boiling water, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
8. Dip the tops of warm doughnuts in the frosting.
YIELD: 4 dozen
